name: physics_simulator
description: Physics surrogate model using neural operators (FNO) or PINN with MC-dropout uncertainty quantification and Mahalanobis OOD rejection. Also generates parametrised SAC305 reflow thermal profiles with physics-consistent defect labels (cold_joint, overshoot_damage, insufficient_wetting, excessive_tal_voids, thermal_shock_tombstone) for downstream synthetic-vision training. Predicts physics in milliseconds instead of hours-long CFD simulations.
self_test: python -c "from plugins.prometheus.physics_simulator.wrapper import PLUGIN; import asyncio; r=asyncio.run(PLUGIN.invoke({'mode':'self_test'})); assert r.get('valid', True)"

mode.description: Operation mode. 'reflow_defect_physics' generates SAC305 reflow profiles with physics-consistent defect labels for downstream synthetic-vision training.

count.description: reflow_defect_physics only: number of profiles to generate (default 12).

profile_spec.description: reflow_defect_physics only: explicit list of {peak_c, tal_s, ramp_c_per_s} triples. Omitted slots are drawn from a balanced defect mix.

seed.description: reflow_defect_physics only: deterministic seed for jitter (default 17).

duration_s.description: reflow_defect_physics only: total duration of each simulated curve in seconds (default 300).

dt_s.description: reflow_defect_physics only: sample interval in seconds (default 1.0).

model_type.description: Surrogate model type (default 'auto': FNO if neuraloperator installed, else PINN).

parameters.description: PDE parameters (e.g. thermal diffusivity, initial conditions).

n_mc_samples.description: Number of MC dropout forward passes for UQ (default 20).
